_meta.source: Atticus Project CUAD — privacy clause subset
_meta._instructions: Populate via scripts/lib-benchmarks.js cuadFromHfDataset(filter=[...]). Each instance follows `_schema`.

instance.source_doc_text: string (full contract text, truncated to 30k chars if needed)
instance.question: string (partner-facing privacy question template)

gold_labels.label_text: string (the annotated clause text from CUAD)
